equip_crown.title: Equip the Scarlet Crown — trigger the Manifestor Trap to obtain the Cursed Eye

subtitle.translate: No one forced you to put on the Crown. That is the point.

description: The Manifestor Trap is the Cursed Eye acquisition mechanic.
Equipping the Scarlet Crown triggers the event.
The Pack requires this. There is no alternative path.
The moral question is not whether you use it.
It is what you build on that foundation in Ch16 and Ch17.
→ Equip the Scarlet Crown — begin the Manifestor Trap event [check]
→ Collect 4 Vile Herb (from Ch08 if not already collected)
